Nokogiri 1.10.5 updated libxslt to version 1.1.34 to address this and other vulnerabilities in libxslt.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.05147, "percentile": 0.91338}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cf46-6xxh-pc75",
